category.name: DSA
category.description: A Java-first DSA series covering complexity, patterns, data structures, dry runs, and interview problem-solving without hand-wavy explanations.
category.seoDescription: Learn data structures and algorithms in Java with practical guides on Big-O, two pointers, binary search, sliding window, trees, graphs, and interview patterns.

posts.title: Big-O Notation in Java: Time and Space Complexity for Interview Problem Solving
posts.description: A practical Java-first guide to Big-O notation for interviews. Learn how to analyze loops, recursion, collections, amortized complexity, and common mistakes with clear code examples.
posts.excerpt: Big-O notation scares a lot of people because it often gets explained as math first and problem solving second. In interviews, that is backward. You do not need to sound like a theoretician. You need to look at code, est…

posts.title: Sliding Window Pattern in Java: Efficiently Solve Array and String Subarray Problems
posts.description: Master the sliding window pattern in Java for array and string problems. Learn fixed and variable-size windows, dry runs, and complexity analysis for optimal solutions.
posts.excerpt: Introduction to the Sliding Window Pattern The Sliding Window pattern is a powerful technique used to solve problems that involve finding a subarray, subsegment, or substring in a given array or string that satisfies a c…

posts.title: Two Pointers Pattern in Java: Solve Array and String Problems Efficiently
posts.description: Learn the two pointers pattern in Java with clear intuition, reusable templates, dry runs, and interview-style examples for arrays, strings, and in-place problems.
posts.excerpt: The two pointers pattern is one of the fastest ways to turn a slow nested-loop solution into a clean linear-time solution. It shows up everywhere: - sorted arrays - palindrome problems - deduplication - partitioning - li…
